name: Marinated Cherry Tomatoes Over Garlic Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 pint Cherry tomatoes, preferably mixed colors and stems removed
2 Green onions, white part only, coarsely chopped
1 tbsp Finely chopped rosemary or 2 tsp Dried chopped rosemary
3 Garlic cloves, peeled with ends removed
Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow bowl, mix tomatoes, green onions, parsley, rosemary, garlic, olive oil, and vinegar. Season with salt and pepper. Cover the bowl and let marinate at room temperature for at least 1 hour, but preferably 3-4 hours or overnight. Stir occasionally.
2. For garlic bread:
a. In a small bowl, mix olive oil and minced garlic. Let stand for 10 minutes so flavors blend.
b. Preheat the broiler. Brush one side of each thick slice of crusty bread with the garlic/olive oil mixture. Place oiled sides up under the broiler until lightly browned.
c. Place a slice of provolone cheese and a generous sprinkling of freshly grated Parmesan on the toasted sides of each slice. Save some for garnish.
